message:
test(fj-conformance): add oracle tests for Neg primitive

Add 22 oracle tests for Neg primitive covering:
- Basic float and integer values
- Special values (infinity, NaN)
- Double negation / involution property
- Additive inverse (x + neg(x) = 0)
- Linearity over addition
- Complex number negation
- 1D/2D tensor shapes
- Sign flipping verification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
